title: Hackers Backdoor Telnyx Python SDK on PyPI to Steal Cloud and Dev Credentials

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Hackers Backdoor Telnyx Python SDK on PyPI to Steal Cloud an
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/01
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '83.142.209.203'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*checkmarx.zone*'
            - '*hangup.wav*'
            - '*ringtone.wav*'
            - '*sysmon.service*'
            - '*tpcp.tar.gz*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 83.142.209.203 any (msg:"CDB APEX - Hackers_Backdoor_Telnyx_Python"; sid:2200114; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 83.142.209.203 any (msg:"CDB APEX Hackers_Backdoor_Telnyx_Python"; sid:5420068; rev:1;)
